name: hover-card
title: BTHoverCard
description: Hover-triggered floating card that appears after a configurable delay when the user hovers over a trigger element. Supports four-direction positioning (top/bottom/left/right) with auto-flip and alignment control. Web only (Vue + React).

files.content:
<!--
  BTHoverCard — root component.

  Manages open state and delay timers. Provides shared context to
  BTHoverCardTrigger and BTHoverCardContent via Vue provide/inject.

  Hover lifecycle:
    mouseenter trigger → openDelay timer → isOpen = true
    mouseleave trigger → closeDelay timer (cancelled if mouse enters content)
    mouseleave content → closeDelay timer → isOpen = false
    Escape key         → close immediately

  Usage:
    <BTHoverCard :open-delay="700" :close-delay="300">
      <BTHoverCardTrigger>
        <BTButton label="Hover me" />
      </BTHoverCardTrigger>
      <BTHoverCardContent side="bottom" align="center">
        <BTHoverCardItem title="Title" description="..." caption="..." />
      </BTHoverCardContent>
    </BTHoverCard>
-->
<script setup lang="ts">
import { ref, provide } from 'vue';
import type { Ref } from 'vue';
import type { BTHoverCardProps } from './BTHoverCard.types';

// ── Context type (consumed by Trigger + Content) ─────────────────────────────
export interface BTHoverCardContext {
  isOpen:        Ref<boolean>;
  triggerEl:     Ref<HTMLElement | null>;
  scheduleOpen:  () => void;
  scheduleClose: () => void;
  cancelClose:   () => void;
  /** Close immediately — used by Escape key for accessibility. */
  close:         () => void;
}

const props = withDefaults(defineProps<BTHoverCardProps>(), {
  openDelay:  0,
  closeDelay: 0,
});

// ── State ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const isOpen    = ref(false);
const triggerEl = ref<HTMLElement | null>(null);

let openTimer:  ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null = null;
let closeTimer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null = null;

// ── Timer actions ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function scheduleOpen() {
  if (closeTimer) { clearTimeout(closeTimer); closeTimer = null; }
  if (isOpen.value) return;
  openTimer = setTimeout(() => { isOpen.value = true; }, props.openDelay);
}

function scheduleClose() {
  if (openTimer) { clearTimeout(openTimer); openTimer = null; }
  closeTimer = setTimeout(() => { isOpen.value = false; }, props.closeDelay);
}

function cancelClose() {
  if (closeTimer) { clearTimeout(closeTimer); closeTimer = null; }
}

function close() {
  if (openTimer)  { clearTimeout(openTimer);  openTimer  = null; }
  if (closeTimer) { clearTimeout(closeTimer); closeTimer = null; }
  isOpen.value = false;
}

// ── Provide context ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
provide<BTHoverCardContext>('bt-hover-card', {
  isOpen,
  triggerEl,
  scheduleOpen,
  scheduleClose,
  cancelClose,
  close,
});
</script>

<template>
  <slot />
</template>
